title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BAUTISTA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE BARRIO OF BAUTISTA, CITY OF SAN PABLO, TO FERNANDO QUISUMBING ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 18749 / 65 OG No. 49, 13556 (December 8, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5629, June 21, 1969 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BAUTISTA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE BARRIO OF BAUTISTA, CITY OF SAN PABLO, TO FERNANDO QUISUMBING ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Bautista Elementary School in the Barrio of Bautista, City of San Pablo, is hereby changed to Fernando Quisumbing Elementary School.

SEC. 2." This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21,1969.
